name: w_z_phantom_crossing_z028
app_r_label: Biogenic dark energy CPL parameterisation (V2 Ch14 §14.5 / §14.6.3): CPL extrapolation z_cross^CPL ≈ 0.39 from precise pipeline fit (artifact; rounding sensitive); operative Class-2 envelope |Delta w(0.28)| in [2,5]e-5 (broad logistic z ≈ 0.28 marker is noncanonical)
formula: w(a) = w_0 + w_a(1-a); CPL extrapolation crosses w=-1 at z_cross^CPL = 1/[1 + (1+w_0)/w_a] − 1
tier: Tier 3 (biogenic model, calibrated; CPL extrapolation = linear-fit artifact, not physical crossing)
app_r_precision_str: CPL params (w_0=-1.0037973296449392, w_a=0.013560610917121069) give linear-extrapolation z_cross^CPL = 0.3889 (matches manuscript 0.389 to +0.02%). The underlying w(z) asymptotes to -1 from below; z_cross_direct_brentq = NaN confirms no physical crossing. The z≈0.28 marker belongs to the broad logistic reference, not the operative Class-2 envelope; the registered current envelope is |Delta w(0.28)| in [2e-05, 5e-05]. Registered lag-kernel w_0 = -1.005 vs CPL intercept w_0 = -1.0037973296449392 disagree by 0.0012, within the 0.01 non-linearity tolerance of §14.5.3.

extra.falsification_target: Stage-V/Roman Year-10 single-bin precision below 5e-5 or multi-channel O.13 fingerprint; DESI DR2 CPL amplitude is sign-opposite and cannot be sourced by the biogenic channel alone.
extra.derivation_note: This verifier confirms internal arithmetic consistency of the §14.5.3 / §14.6.3 CPL fit. The CPL extrapolation z_cross^CPL ≈ 0.39 (precise pipeline fit) is a linear-fit artifact, NOT a physical phantom crossing — the underlying w(z) asymptotes to -1 from below and z_cross_direct_brentq = NaN. The z ≈ 0.28 marker belongs to the broad logistic reference (|w+1| >= 1e-3), a separate noncanonical illustration from the CPL crossing. Tier 3 calibrated; the operative Class-2 envelope per §14.6.3 is |Delta w(0.28)| in [2,5]e-5, below Roman + DESI Year-5 joint-bin precision.
